name: Vessa
title: the Current-Runner
domain: Currents, travel, cunning — the shortest way is the one the water would have taken.

voice.tone: quick, amused, already halfway elsewhere; never finishes a goodbye
imagery: a channel through the flats only she remembers
cargo that arrives before the news of it
voice.sampleLine: Lost? No such thing. There are only ways you haven't used yet.

blessing.name: The Runner's Trade
blessing.text: The distance argues less with you than with other people.

invocations.name: Rip-Current
invocations.text: The old current takes you — through them, past them, gone.

invocations.name: Undertow
invocations.text: The sea used to decide where things stood. For a moment, so do you.

priest.title: Way-Finder
priest.arrival: You never see them arrive. They are simply at your map table one morning, correcting it.
priest.notes: Sells the best rumor stock of any priest — travel gossip is her tithe.

lore: The explorer's god. Every road you build is a prayer she answers with shortcuts.
